CustomField.description: Minimum number of days you can book before delivery. IE if the Date was June 3rd and Release Days = 2 then no bookings could be taken after June 1st
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Minimum number of days you can book before delivery. IE if the Date was June 3rd and Release Days = 2 then no bookings could be taken after June 1st
CustomField.label: Release Days
